meta.title: Sunder Implementation Phasing Plan
meta.source: roadmap docs/Sunder - Source of Truth/product-dev/01-App Spec.md §17
changelog: 2026-03-01: Audit fix — added 5 missing DB tables, 3 missing tool categories, MEMORY.md bootstrap, 3 new PRs (12a, 19a, 32a), fixed 10+ missing decision IDs on existing PRs
2026-03-02: Status sync — marked Phase 1 as in_progress, PRs 1–4 as done (all tasks), PR 5 as in_progress (migrations written)
2026-03-02: PR 5 marked done, PR 6 now in_progress
2026-03-02: PR 8 marked in_progress — tasklist generated at docs/tasks/2026-03-02-pr8-web-search-tool-tasklist.md
2026-03-02: PR 7 marked done — storage tools + agent-files bucket + RLS policies applied to remote Supabase
2026-03-02: PR 6 marked done, PR 8 now in_progress
2026-03-02: PR 8 marked done, PR 9 now in_progress
2026-03-03: PR 11 marked done, PR 12 now in_progress
2026-03-04: PR 12 + PR 12a marked done. Phase 1 complete.
2026-03-03: PR 12 marked done (lean scope): step_count on runs, onFinish step counting, tool-error resilience test, schema/type updates
2026-03-03: PR 12a marked done — vault_files schema + RLS/realtime, Knowledge page (search/upload/download), vault metadata sync + tests

phases.title: Chat + CRM + Basic Tools
phases.goal: User can chat with an AI agent that reads/writes CRM data, searches the web, and reads/writes files. Read-only CRM pages let the user verify what the agent did.
phases.demoMoment: "I met John Smith at 123 Oak St" → agent creates contact + deal, user sees it in CRM page
phases.endState: User logs in → sees chat → talks to agent → agent creates CRM data → user verifies in CRM pages. Existing document processing untouched.
alreadyDone: Vercel Pro plan with Fluid Compute (EXEC-02)

prs.title: Vercel AI Gateway + basic streaming endpoint

tasks.task: Install @ai-sdk/gateway and ai (Vercel AI SDK)
Create app/api/chat/route.ts (App Router)
Wire up Vercel AI Gateway with AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY
Basic streamText() call with Gemini Flash (Tier 1)
Hardcoded system prompt (real estate agent persona placeholder)
No tools yet — just streaming text responses

testCriteria: curl the endpoint, get a streamed response

prs.title: Chat UI with streaming

tasks.task: Replace /chat placeholder with real chat interface
useChat() hook from Vercel AI SDK pointed at new endpoint
Message list, input box, streaming response display
Thread rail in sidebar (new thread button, thread list)
Chat is default home after login (redirect from / dashboard)

testCriteria: Log in, type a message, see streamed response

prs.title: Clients + conversation threads + messages DB schema

tasks.task: Migration: clients table (client_id UUID PK, user_id FK to auth.users UNIQUE, display_name, created_at)
Migration: database trigger on auth.users INSERT → auto-creates clients row
Migration: conversation_threads table (thread_id UUID PK, client_id FK, title, is_pinned, created_at, updated_at)
Migration: conversation_messages table (message_id, thread_id FK, role, content, parts JSONB, created_at)
Migration: runs table (run_id, thread_id FK, client_id FK, status enum, model, tokens_in, tokens_out, created_at, completed_at)
RLS policies on all tables: client_id = (SELECT client_id FROM clients WHERE user_id = auth.uid()) pattern (DATA-03)
Wire chat UI to persist messages to DB
Wire thread rail to list/create conversation_threads from DB

testCriteria: Create thread, send messages, refresh page — conversation persists

prs.title: Runner engine (core loop) + per-thread serialization

tasks.task: Create src/lib/runner/run-agent.ts — single runAgent() function
Context assembly skeleton: system prompt + thread message history (RUNNER-03 — full 7-layer assembly in Phase 2)
streamText() with maxSteps: 4 and empty tools array
Run status tracking: create run record on start, update on completion
Stateless invocation model (RUNNER-05): every call loads fresh from DB
No pause-and-resume (SESSION-04): question ends run, reply starts new run with full history
Strict tool contract types with Zod schemas (TOOL-01)
Per-thread run serialization (TRIG-06): atomic run insert checks no active run
Migration: thread_queue_records table
Queue draining: on run completion, batch queued messages and start next run
Refactor /api/chat/route.ts to call runAgent() with queue check

testCriteria: Chat works exactly as before but goes through runner
Send two messages fast — second gets queued, processed after first completes

prs.title: CRM schema + seed data

tasks.task: Migration: contacts table (contact_id, client_id, first_name, last_name, email, phone, type enum, notes, timestamps)
Migration: deals table (deal_id, client_id, address, stage enum, price, contact_id FK, notes, timestamps)
Migration: interactions table (interaction_id, client_id, contact_id FK, deal_id FK nullable, type enum, summary, occurred_at, timestamps)
Migration: crm_tasks table (task_id, client_id, title, description, status enum, due_date, contact_id FK, deal_id FK, timestamps)
Migration: crm_config table (config_id, client_id, deal_stages JSONB, task_types JSONB, interaction_types JSONB)
RLS on all CRM tables using DATA-03 pattern

testCriteria: Tables exist, RLS works, can insert/query via Supabase dashboard

prs.title: CRM tools for the agent

tasks.task: Implement search_contacts tool with Zod schema
Implement create_contact tool with Zod schema
Implement update_contact tool with Zod schema
Implement search_deals tool with Zod schema
Implement create_deal tool with Zod schema
Implement update_deal tool with Zod schema
Implement create_interaction tool with Zod schema
Implement search_tasks tool with Zod schema
Implement create_task tool with Zod schema
Implement update_task tool with Zod schema
Register all CRM tools in runner's streamText() call
Bump maxSteps to 8 for tool usage

testCriteria: Ask agent 'create a contact for John Smith, phone 555-1234' → contact appears in DB

prs.title: File tools (Supabase Storage)

tasks.task: Create per-client storage layout: /{clientId}/ root in Supabase Storage
Implement read_file tool (file path → content, directory path → tree listing)
Implement write_file tool (writes to Supabase Storage, path-scoped to client)
Create agent-files storage bucket (separate from existing documents/reports)
RLS on storage: client can only access own prefix
Accept no file versioning in v1 — Supabase Storage trade-off (DATA-05)

testCriteria: Ask agent 'write a note about today's showing' → file appears in Storage

prs.title: Web search tool

tasks.task: Implement web_search tool using Brave Search API with Zod schema
Input: query string. Output: formatted search results (title, snippet, URL)
Implement web_scrape tool (fetch URL → extract text content)

testCriteria: Ask agent 'search for recent home sales in Austin TX' → returns real results

prs.title: Supabase Realtime for live updates

tasks.task: Wire Supabase Realtime subscriptions on CRM tables
When agent creates/updates contact or deal, frontend reflects immediately
Subscribe on thread page load, unsubscribe on unmount

testCriteria: Have agent create a contact while CRM page is open in another tab → appears without refresh

prs.title: CRM read-only pages (Contacts)

tasks.task: Replace /crm placeholder with tabbed CRM section
Contacts list page: TanStack Table with search/filter
Contact detail page: read-only fields + linked deals + interaction timeline
Navigation: add CRM to sidebar nav

testCriteria: Agent creates contacts via chat, user browses them in CRM pages

prs.title: CRM read-only pages (Deals + Tasks)

tasks.task: Deals list page: TanStack Table with stage badges
Deal detail page: read-only fields + linked contact + interactions
Tasks list page: table view with status, due date, linked contact/deal

testCriteria: Full CRM browse experience across contacts, deals, tasks

prs.title: Audit trail + basic safety

tasks.task: Migration: add runs.step_count INTEGER with non-negative check for run step analytics
Extend completeRun to accept optional stepCount and persist to runs.step_count
Wire streamText onFinish steps.length into completeRun stepCount
Validate tool error resilience: thrown tool execute errors are handled without crashing run
Align run schema/tests and database types for runs.step_count; verify test suite

testCriteria: runs.step_count is persisted on completion and accepts zero/non-negative values
Runner completion passes steps.length into run lifecycle persistence
Tool execute throw is surfaced as tool-error content without crashing the run
Cost tracking fields (model, tokens_in, tokens_out) remain intact from PR4
Vitest suite passes after migration, schema, and type updates

prs.title: Knowledge Base schema + pages
prs.note: Added in audit — Knowledge Base was entirely missing from original plan despite vault_files being a v1 table (DATA-09) and Knowledge appearing in nav structure (§14.1).

tasks.task: Migration: vault_files table (file_id, client_id, filename, storage_path, content_type, size, full_text_search tsvector, created_at, updated_at)
RLS on vault_files
Knowledge Base list page: file browser with search (full-text via vault_files SQL, not directory listing per DATA-06)
Knowledge Base upload: store file in Supabase Storage, index metadata in vault_files
Navigation: add Knowledge to sidebar nav under DATABASE section

testCriteria: Upload a document to Knowledge Base, search for it by content, agent can reference it

phases.title: Memory + Personality + Autopilot
phases.goal: Agent remembers across sessions. Background autopilot proactively monitors deals. Smart model routing reduces cost.
phases.demoMoment: Agent remembers your name next session. Autopilot emails you about stale deals.

prs.title: Storage layout + SOUL.md + USER.md + MEMORY.md

tasks.task: Bootstrap /{clientId}/SOUL.md on first login
Bootstrap /{clientId}/USER.md on first login
Bootstrap /{clientId}/MEMORY.md on first login (working notebook)
Default SOUL.md: real estate agent personality template
Default USER.md: empty, agent populates during conversations
Default MEMORY.md: empty, agent writes working notes (first 200 lines loaded every run at context position #3)
Runner reads SOUL.md + USER.md + MEMORY.md (first 200 lines) at context assembly time (RUNNER-03 becomes real)

testCriteria: First login creates SOUL.md, USER.md, and MEMORY.md in storage
Agent responses reflect personality from SOUL.md

prs.title: Memory system

tasks.task: Seed /{clientId}/memory/ directory with 4 starter files: preferences.md, growth-plan.md, patterns.md, key-decisions.md (MEM-03/MEM-04 taxonomy)
Agent reads memory files during context assembly (on-demand via read_file)
Agent auto-writes to memory during runs per MEM-05 rules (preferences: immediate on lasting preference, patterns: after 3+ instances, key-decisions: on significant decisions)
Memory files are storage-only — discovered via directory listing (DATA-06)
Memory shared across all threads (MEM-06)
Agent can create new memory files via write_file when observation doesn't fit existing files

testCriteria: Agent writes a preference to memory, next session it remembers

prs.title: Platform instructions + system-reminder

tasks.task: Full 7-layer context assembly order (RUNNER-03): 0-Platform instructions, 1-System prompt, 2-SOUL.md, 3-USER.md, 4-MEMORY.md first 200 lines, 5-Thread compaction summary, 6-Recent messages, 7-Current message
Platform instructions layer (position #0 in context assembly) — forked from Tasklet, adapted for Sunder
System-reminder injection per turn (~130 tokens): current time, user display name, active trigger count, open task count, pending approval count, memory file count, days since signup (RUNNER-04)

testCriteria: Agent knows current time and user context without being told

prs.title: Model routing

tasks.task: routeQuestion() classifier using Gemini Flash Lite
Named model set with fallback chains
Background tier for cheap work (DeepSeek/Kimi)
Two routing paths: interactive (classifier) and trigger (hardcoded tier)

testCriteria: Simple greeting uses Gemini Flash
Complex analysis request routes to higher tier
Background tasks use cheap model

prs.title: Per-run telemetry

tasks.task: Migration: usage_telemetry table
Log model, tokens, cost, latency per run
Cost ceiling monitoring (target: <$20/user/mo)

testCriteria: After several conversations, telemetry table shows accurate token/cost data

prs.title: Cron scanner + agent_triggers table

tasks.task: Migration: agent_triggers table schema
Create /api/cron/scan route (Vercel cron, 1 min)
Scanner queries next_run_at, fires /api/trigger/run
Atomic claim via UPDATE ... SET status = 'running' WHERE status = 'active' RETURNING *
Per-thread serialization for trigger runs (TRIG-06)

testCriteria: Trigger fires on schedule, creates a run, no double-execution

prs.title: Autopilot thread + pulse

tasks.task: Pre-installed 'Sunder Autopilot' pinned thread on signup
Autopilot trigger auto-created (6h default pulse)
Migration: autopilot_config table (config_id, client_id, pulse_interval enum [1h/2h/6h/12h], quiet_hours_start, quiet_hours_end, enabled boolean)
Autopilot runs in trigger mode (generateText, not streamText)

Autopilot system prompt with 11-level priority order from §7.2 (TRIG-08): advance tasks → check overdue → act on monitors → follow up → handle blockers → start next task → research → get to know user → engage user → propose goals → create momentum
Bootstrap requirement: autopilot MUST call tools for live state before acting (thread history ≠ current truth)
Noise suppression: lower frequency + prompt instructions to avoid low-value pulses (TRIG-09)
Email notifications for autopilot results via platform send_message (TRIG-06b)

testCriteria: Autopilot fires every 6h, produces meaningful output in its thread
Autopilot calls tools for fresh CRM state before acting
Pulse interval configurable via autopilot_config

prs.title: Agent tasks + goals schema
prs.note: Added in audit — agent_tasks and goals tables were missing from original plan despite being v1 tables in DATA-09. Required for Tasks UI (PR 36) and autopilot goal tracking.

tasks.task: Migration: agent_tasks table (task_id, client_id, title, description, status enum [planning/planned/in_progress/review/done/cancelled], source enum [manual/autopilot/skill], contact_id FK nullable, deal_id FK nullable, goal_id FK nullable, created_at, updated_at)
Migration: goals table (goal_id, client_id, title, description, status enum [active/completed/abandoned], target_date, created_at, updated_at)
RLS on both tables using DATA-03 pattern
Agent tools: search_agent_tasks, create_agent_task, update_agent_task, search_goals, create_goal, update_goal

testCriteria: Agent creates an agent_task, autopilot can track and advance it

prs.title: Trigger tools + user-created triggers

tasks.task: Implement create_trigger tool
Implement search_triggers tool
Implement manage_active_triggers tool
Two retry policies: autopilot (0 retries), everything else (max 2)

testCriteria: Ask agent to 'check PropertyGuru every morning' → trigger created and fires on schedule

prs.title: Memory synthesis pulse

tasks.task: Create dedicated Memory Synthesis pinned thread on signup
Separate trigger from autopilot (weekly cadence)
Reads memory files, detects patterns, proposes skill items
Checks MEMORY.md line count, self-organizes if approaching 200-line cap

testCriteria: Weekly synthesis produces summary of memory changes, asks user to confirm/correct

prs.title: Context recovery + thread compaction

tasks.task: Toolcall artifact recovery on context truncation
Long-thread summarization when context budget exceeded
Compaction instructions tuned for CRM (preserve deal names, contacts, decisions)
Use provider-native compaction via AI SDK provider options where available, fallback to prepareStep callback

testCriteria: Long conversation with 50+ messages still works correctly after compaction

phases.title: Skills + Connections + Sandbox
phases.goal: Agent becomes extensible — skills customize behavior, connections integrate external services, sandbox runs code.
phases.demoMoment: User connects Gmail, agent drafts follow-up. Agent generates CMA in sandbox.

prs.title: Skill system — registry

tasks.task: Migration: skill_registry table
Skill manifest format (name, description, config, runbook, subagent instructions)
System skills: CRM management, document processing, daily briefing
Skill discovery: agent can list and describe available skills

testCriteria: System skills are pre-loaded and agent can describe them

prs.title: Skill system — loading + custom skills

tasks.task: Skill loading at context assembly time
Custom skill creation via Guided Interview UI
Agent-proposed skills via Growth Plan
Skill testing and audit trail

testCriteria: User creates a custom skill, agent uses it in a subsequent conversation

prs.title: Composio connections + OAuth

tasks.task: Migration: connections table
Composio SDK integration for OAuth flows
Connection-first behavior: agent checks existing before proposing new (CONN-03)
One-shot OAuth setup with token refresh

prs.title: Connection tools

tasks.task: Integration actions tool (Composio)
MCP connection support (done-for-you setup in v1)
Direct API connection support (done-for-you setup in v1)
computer_use returns 'not yet available' placeholder

testCriteria: Agent uses Composio action to read user's calendar

prs.title: Vercel Sandbox integration — setup

tasks.task: Migration: sandbox_sessions table
Vercel Sandbox SDK integration
Ephemeral microVM spin-up and teardown
Sandbox execution within agent tool framework

prs.title: Vercel Sandbox integration — artifacts

tasks.task: Artifact generation in sandbox (CMA, reports) via custom skills (SERVICE-10)
Artifact storage and retrieval
Sandbox timeout and resource limits
Error handling and graceful degradation

prs.title: Subagents

tasks.task: Subagent spawning for parallel research
Subagent spawning for document analysis
Results summarization back to parent context
Context isolation to prevent main context bloat

testCriteria: Agent spawns subagent for research, results appear in main thread

prs.title: Full tool surface

tasks.task: Complete tool inventory matching Tasklet's 30+ built-in tools
Hybrid contract: strict internal + normalized envelope for external
Raw provider payloads retained for debugging
Database tools: run_agent_memory_sql (read-only CRM queries), get_agent_db_schema (introspect available tables)
UI tools: show_preview (render artifact in preview panel), close_preview, rename_chat (update thread title)

testCriteria: All 12 tool categories from TOOL-03 functional end-to-end

prs.title: Scraping lanes

tasks.task: Lane 1: Known-site scraping (Apify + RapidAPI)
Lane 2: Open-ended scraping (Scrapling + flat-rate LLM)
Lane 3: Interactive scraping placeholder (Stagehand + Browserbase)

testCriteria: Agent can scrape a known property listing site and return structured data

prs.title: Document processing as agent tool

tasks.task: Wire existing /api/gemini/process as a tool the agent can call
Agent can trigger document classification/extraction on behalf of user
Migration: document_processing_records table (record_id, client_id, vault_file_id FK, processing_type, status, result JSONB, created_at)

testCriteria: Agent processes a document through existing pipeline when asked, record stored in document_processing_records

prs.title: Email messaging tools (Resend)
prs.note: Added in audit — email sending via Resend (SERVICE-13) and tool-level idempotency for external tools (TRIG-13) were missing from original plan.

tasks.task: Resend SDK integration for transactional email
Implement send_message tool (platform email via Resend) with Zod schema
Implement reply_message tool for threaded email replies
Tool-level idempotency for external-facing tools (TRIG-13): dedup via sent_messages table to prevent duplicate sends on retry
Migration: sent_messages table for idempotency tracking

testCriteria: Agent sends email via Resend after approval
Duplicate send attempt is caught by idempotency check

phases.title: Polish + Approval Gates + Eval
phases.goal: Product feels complete. Approval gates, onboarding, Mission Control.
phases.demoMoment: Onboarding flow, Mission Control, agent asks permission before sending.

prs.title: Approval system — gate implementation

tasks.task: Two-tier safety model: auto-run internal, approval for external
Approval gate as chat interaction (not special UI)
Agent presents action in plain language, waits for user reply
User says yes → agent continues. No → run cancelled.
Works identically in chat and trigger threads

testCriteria: Agent tries to send email, pauses for approval, continues after yes

prs.title: Approval system — events + UI

tasks.task: Migration: approval_events table
Approval queue visible in Mission Control
Trigger thread shows pending action, user opens thread to respond
No per-action granularity, no configurable matrix in v1 (SAFETY-04)

testCriteria: Pending approvals show in Mission Control queue, can be resolved from there

prs.title: Mission Control — Overview tab

tasks.task: Status dashboard with agent activity summary
Recent runs, active triggers, memory stats
Quick actions to common agent tasks

testCriteria: Mission Control Overview shows accurate real-time agent status

prs.title: Mission Control — Queue tab + Tasks UI

tasks.task: Queue tab: approvals, failures, blocked tasks, goals at risk
Unified Tasks page: Board (kanban), List, Goals views — dual task model (TASKLET-05): CRM tasks (binary open/completed) + agent tasks (full lifecycle)
Sort by: Needs Approval → Blocked → Overdue → Due Soon → Recently Updated
Source labels: [CRM], [MANUAL], [AUTOPILOT]
Blocked and Needs Approval are badges, not columns

testCriteria: Tasks board shows both CRM tasks and agent tasks with correct sorting and labels

prs.title: Structured AI input

tasks.task: AI presents clickable options via streamUI
Optional freeform input alongside options
Used by: User Profiling, Skill-Building, Workflow Creation

testCriteria: Agent presents multiple-choice options in chat, user can click to respond

prs.title: Onboarding flow

tasks.task: Phase 1: Quick Activation (<10 min) — signup, connect services, seed files
Phase 2: Deep Profile Interview (scheduled within first week)
Migration: setup_progress table
Migration: guided_interview_sessions table
Re-suggest Phase 2 interview max once per 48h if skipped

testCriteria: New user goes through full onboarding, first useful output in <10 min

prs.title: CRM vocabulary customization via chat
prs.note: Added post-audit. The crm_config table (PR5) stores custom deal_stages, task_types, interaction_types as JSONB, but nothing wires it up. Currently all enums (contact types, deal stages, interaction types, deal-contact roles) are hardcoded to real estate vocabulary in Zod schemas and tool descriptions. This PR makes them dynamic so the CRM can serve any B2C vertical (insurance, financial advisory, car sales, etc.) — not just real estate. User configures via chat conversation, agent writes to crm_config, and all schemas + tool descriptions pull from config at runtime.

tasks.task: Chat-driven CRM configuration: agent interviews user about their sales process (deal stages, contact roles, interaction types) and writes to crm_config
Dynamic Zod schemas: contact types, deal stages, deal-contact roles, and interaction types pull from crm_config at runtime instead of hardcoded enums
Dynamic tool descriptions: LLM tool .describe() strings template from crm_config so the agent knows the user's vocabulary
Rename deals.address to deals.title (or make address optional) to support non-property verticals
Sensible defaults: if crm_config is empty, fall back to current real estate enums

testCriteria: User tells agent 'I sell insurance, my stages are lead/quoted/underwriting/bound/lost' via chat, agent updates crm_config, and all CRM tools reflect the new vocabulary
Default real estate vocabulary still works for users who skip configuration

prs.title: Higher tier models

tasks.task: Tier 2: Gemini Pro for CRM writes, research, multi-source synthesis
Tier 3: Claude Sonnet for complex analysis, approval-adjacent decisions
Fallback chains between tiers

testCriteria: Complex requests route to higher tiers, fallbacks work when primary model is unavailable

prs.title: Eval harness + observability

tasks.task: Eval harness for agent quality testing
Observability pipeline for production monitoring
Quality metrics and regression detection

testCriteria: Eval suite runs against test scenarios, produces quality scores

phases.title: Channels + Scale

Cost ceiling enforcement

crossPhaseDependencies.description: Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 3 → Phase 4 → Phase 5. Phase 4 UX work can start in parallel with Phase 3.

uncoveredDecisions.description: Architecture decisions that are intentionally not assigned to any PR. Tracked here for completeness.

deferredToPostV1.reason: Deferred to post-v1 per App Spec §5.1

crossCuttingPrinciples.topic: Turborepo deferred until second package needed

resolvedQuestions.question: Existing pages/api/ routes
resolvedQuestions.resolution: Keep as-is. Pages Router stays for document processing. App Router for new agent endpoints.

resolvedQuestions.question: Existing Anthropic Analyst chat
resolvedQuestions.resolution: Replace in Phase 3 when Vercel Sandbox + document tools are ready.

resolvedQuestions.question: Turborepo migration timing
resolvedQuestions.resolution: Defer until needed. No Turborepo until a second package emerges.

resolvedQuestions.question: Existing WhatsApp tables
resolvedQuestions.resolution: Ignore, rebuild in Phase 5. Old tables cost nothing sitting inert.

resolvedQuestions.question: Environment variables
resolvedQuestions.resolution: Coexist (AI Gateway + direct API keys), consolidate naturally.

resolvedQuestions.question: Stripe billing (FOUND-07)
resolvedQuestions.resolution: Deferred to post-v1. No implementation PR — will be addressed when pricing is finalized.
